landing.title: TradingGoose - Visual Workflow Platform for LLM Trading | Open Source
landing.description: Open-source platform for technical LLM-driven trading. Custom indicators in PineTS, live market monitors, and AI agent workflows triggered by market signals.
landing.openGraphTitle: TradingGoose - Visual Workflow Platform for LLM Trading
landing.openGraphDescription: Open-source platform for technical LLM-driven trading. Custom indicators in PineTS, live market monitors, AI agent workflows triggered by market signals.

seo.keywords: AI trading workflows, LLM trading agents, technical trading automation, custom trading indicators, PineTS indicators, visual trading workflow builder, trading signal automation, market data workflow, backtesting platform, open source trading platform, algorithmic trading, AI trading assistant
seo.llmContentType: visual workflow platform for trading, custom indicators, AI agent workflows for markets
seo.llmUseCases: signal-driven trade execution, portfolio rebalancing, indicator alerts, strategy backtesting, market sentiment analysis, custom trading dashboards
seo.llmIntegrations: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini, xAI, Mistral, Perplexity, Ollama, custom market data providers

blog.title: Blog | TradingGoose
blog.description: Articles about trading automation, workflow design, and building smarter strategies.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy | TradingGoose
privacy.description: Privacy Policy for TradingGoose Studio, covering account data, workflows, connected services, analytics, billing, and retention practices.

hero.description: Connect your own data providers, write custom indicators to monitor market prices, and wire them into workflows that trigger trade, sell, buy, or any action you define.

cta.title: Let AI agents work your trading strategy.
cta.description: See what the community is building with TradingGoose.

footer.description: AI workflow platform for technical LLM trading

market.indicatorUnavailableError: Indicator is not available in this showcase.

howItWorks.title: From data to decision
howItWorks.description: Connect your own data sources, monitor markets with custom indicators, let AI agents analyze what matters, and trigger workflows that act on your behalf.

processes.title: Connect your data
processes.description: Plug in any market data provider and stream live prices into the workspace.

processes.title: Monitor with indicators
processes.description: Write custom PineTS indicators that watch for the conditions you care about.

processes.title: Analyze with AI agents
processes.description: Let LLM-powered agent blocks evaluate signals, assess risk, and make decisions autonomously.

processes.title: Trigger workflows
processes.description: When a signal fires, kick off a workflow to trade, alert, log, or anything else you define.

monitorSection.title: Indicators that trigger workflows
monitorSection.description: Set up monitors that watch your indicators on live market data. When a signal fires, a workflow runs automatically - place orders, send alerts, log results, or anything else.
bullets: Connect any streaming data provider with your own credentials
Choose an indicator and interval to monitor per listing
Route triggers to any deployed workflow

features.title: Your workspace, your way
features.description: Layouts, charts, and workflows - each designed to work on its own or together.

rows.title: Widget layouts
rows.description: Split the workspace to place widgets side by side or stacked. Save and switch between named layouts per workspace.

rows.title: Indicators and live data
rows.description: Built-in indicators and a PineTS editor for writing custom ones. Connect your own data provider and monitor prices in real time.

rows.title: AI-powered workflows
rows.description: Build workflows on a canvas with AI agent blocks that make LLM-driven decisions. Integrate with Slack, Discord, GitHub, Gmail, and more - then route orders to Alpaca or Tradier.
bullets: AI agent blocks for autonomous analysis and decisions
Integrations with Slack, Discord, GitHub, Gmail, and more
Data, condition, loop, parallel, and trading action blocks

integrations.title: LLM with more than just prompts.
bullets: Every integration becomes a tool your AI agents can call
Built-in blocks for messaging, databases, cloud storage, CRMs, and search
Custom MCP servers, skills, and tools you define yourself

structuredData.name: TradingGoose integrations
structuredData.description: Third-party services, LLM providers, data sources, and tools that TradingGoose integrates with as callable workflow blocks.

blog.pageDescription: Insights on trading automation, workflow design, and building smarter strategies. {{count}} articles and counting.
blog.emptyDescription: Check back soon - new articles are on the way.
